title: Mops,Triangle Mop Head Absorbent Microfiber Chenille Mop Brush Head Replacement Cleaning Tool 2PCS Blue
features: Easy to clean: This absorbent chenille mop head is easy to clean and fast drying for repeated use.
Size: The size of this triangular mop head is 16 x 16 cm, suitable for most triangular mops, easy to install and use.
Material: This mop replacement head is made of chenille material, which is soft and absorbent, not easy to shed, and durable.
Packaging: Include 2 absorbent mop heads for your daily use and replacement needs.
Protection: This soft mop head refill won't scratch your floor surface when you clean. It is better for your home cleaning tasks.
